programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have a chance to buy a 450 year-old book once owned by Sir Isaac Newton. A man walks in with his grandfather's army jacket from the Spanish American War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pablo Pawncasso
programme.desc: Get revved up with the Pawn Stars as they check out a rare REO Flying Cloud hot rod from the 1930s. Rick and Corey are presented with a well-known Picasso etching called 'Poor Roby.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pin It to Win It
programme.desc: The team tries to discover the origins of a mysterious rifle brought into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spare the Rodman
programme.desc: The ex-wife of NBA star Dennis Rodman drops by and tries to sell a collection of Rodman's signed jerseys.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Million Dali Baby
programme.desc: Chumlee and Olivia are offered a sculpture by Salvador Dali.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Grumpy Old Man
programme.desc: Rick checks out a recorded telephone conversation of President John F. Kennedy. Then, an F16 flight suit comes into the shop. Meanwhile, Chumlee tries to record the Old Man yelling at him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Great Pawnbino
programme.desc: Rick tries to hit a homerun with a personal cheque signed by Babe Ruth. Will he be able to hit it out of the ballpark or strike out swinging? Then, Corey floats the idea of purchasing Navy buttons that date back to the Civil War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ponies and Phonies
programme.desc: Rick and Corey attempt to rope in a Bible believed to have been carried by Pony Express riders. Then, Corey attempts to get an R2D2 Pepsi machine that comes in the shop. Later, Lili's internship is up and the guys need to review her performance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spacing Out
programme.desc: Blast off with the Pawn Stars when a 'Space 2005' wristwatch radio rockets into the shop. Then, Rick tries to make a drive-by deal when he checks out a rare, 1964 VW Karmann Ghia.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mr. Cool
programme.desc: A signed print of Ansel Adam's famous photograph, 'Monolith, the Face of Half Dome,' arrives at the shop. Then, a 1791 one-cent coin is brought in that could be worth a lot of money. Later, Corey notices that Rick keeps taking his things.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bo Knows
programme.desc: Read between the lines with the Pawn Stars when an etching by Pablo Picasso traces into the shop. Then, Corey and Chumlee swing for the fences with a bat signed by legendary athlete Bo Jackson.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hot Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: The rarest Hot Wheels car in the world arrives at the shop as well as an etching by Rembrandt. Also, Chum decides he wants to write his memoirs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monumental Pawn
programme.desc: Rick hits the road to take a look at a 1966 Chevy II. Then, he has the task of making a monumental decision when a program from the unveiling of the Statue of Liberty arrives. Later, Corey tries to justify his need for a company car.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn No Evil
programme.desc: A Japanese animatronic 'speak no evil, see no evil, hear no evil' monkey swings in. A painting reveals Glenn Ford's love affair with Marilyn Monroe. An 1800s wooden oil barrel and a Chinese Ming Dynasty Kuan banknote turn up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Double Your Pawn
programme.desc: Harry Carey's collection of nearly 200 celebrity autographs; a 1900s Wrigley Gum vending machine; a measuring device known as a railroad equilibristat; a 1960s Jimmy Jet toy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buddy, Can You Spare a Thousand?
programme.desc: Rick might pay 10 times the face value of a rare $1,000 star note. He later pursues the purchase of a World War II Navy gun scope. Chumlee investigates the mysterious legacy of an ancient bronze statue. Rick and Corey check out an iconic storyboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Declaration of Dopeness
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out a Civil War era carbine that has a surprise 'coffee grinder' in the shoulder stock. Rick contemplates if the unique item is worth a deal. Later on, a vintage skateboard deck makes an appearance in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Frontier Fortune
programme.desc: Strum along with the Pawn Stars when a Gibson lap steel guitar jams into the shop. Next, a letter from pioneer Ezra Meeker and a set of commemorative Oregon Trail coins trek on in. Then, a Victorian snuff box shows up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Halen
programme.desc: A set of 1814 naval history books from John Adam's personal library sails into the shop. An electronic cigar box guitar signed by the legendary frontman Sammy Hager rocks in. Then, a 1901 coin sorter comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawn Commandments
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get all wound up over an automaton that performs a magic trick. A seller with a Bible from the 1500s tries to make a believer out of Corey, but his go-to book expert warns him to beware of false profits.

programme.desc: A philosophy professor responds to her husband's philandering by pursuing fulfillment on her own.

programme.title: Movie: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse

programme.title: Movie: Slender Man

programme.title: Movie: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Movie: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug

programme.desc: The unexplained disappearance of hundreds of ships and aircraft have mysteriously occurred in the Bermuda Triangle, and now investigators are using the latest scientific research to seek the truth behind this notorious stretch of water.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of Secret Societies
programme.desc: Secret societies have an elusive and tangled existence in religious and political forms spanning thousands of years, and now experts investigate the truth behind the looming conspiracies of how a shadowy elite may actually control world governments.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets: Deep Sea Investigation
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearance of hundreds of ships and aircraft have mysteriously occurred in the Bermuda Triangle, and now investigators are using the latest scientific research to seek the truth behind this notorious stretch of water.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of Secret Societies
programme.desc: Secret societies have an elusive and tangled existence in religious and political forms spanning thousands of years, and now experts investigate the truth behind the looming conspiracies of how a shadowy elite may actually control world governments.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets: Deep Sea Investigation
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearance of hundreds of ships and aircraft have mysteriously occurred in the Bermuda Triangle, and now investigators are using the latest scientific research to seek the truth behind this notorious stretch of water.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy
programme.desc: In Ogden, Utah, Stephen and Becky Vargas appear to have it all. Behind the picture perfect life seen in these rare home videos, jealousy and control issues are abound. But no one thought their marriage would end - in murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Broke My Heart
programme.desc: When Vickie Webb's son warned her the police might come looking for him, she wasn't surprised. He had been getting into trouble, but she sensed this time was different.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Now They Lay Me Down to Sleep
programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution. After a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband and father when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Broke My Heart
programme.desc: When Vickie Webb's son warned her the police might come looking for him, she wasn't surprised. He had been getting into trouble, but she sensed this time was different.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Now They Lay Me Down to Sleep
programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution. After a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband and father when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Blood for Money
programme.desc: Money is the driving force behind many crimes, especially murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people's babies - they spilt Blood for Money.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Bizarre Love Triangle
programme.desc: Ann returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him. Police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement, stabbed to death. What happened here is a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Disappearing Act
programme.desc: California real estate developer Jana Koklich vanishes in the summer of 2000. Police suspect her job led her into danger, until a local pastor comes forward with a shocking confession. Someone is lying, but can detectives figure it out in time?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Gone Girl
programme.desc: The body of 20-year old student Sandra Bonaventure is discovered in a garbage bag, on the sidewalk in New York City. The trail of clues will eventually lead detectives to a cold-hearted killer, with an astonishing talent for deception.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: Daniel Ott is just one day from moving with his girlfriend when an intruder shoots him dead with a shotgun. A stunning coincidence will lead the investigation into the heart of one of the most dangerous criminal rings in the country...

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Madness on the Lake
programme.desc: The remote lakeside town of Bayview, Idaho is a little too quiet for local resident Larry Cragun, and soon the isolation gets to him.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A History of Violence
programme.desc: In 1979, a walk in the woods turns out to be a deadly mistake for single mom, Marie Huckins. Twenty years later, her daughter Patricia finds a night out following in the same fateful footsteps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Mathews, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple hunts for a new forever home near the beach in Mathews, VA. They find a house that could be perfect for their family of four but it's a fixer-upper and their budget is tight.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Triple Meat Trifecta
programme.desc: In Newport, R.I., Michael Symon dives into a triple meat-stacked sandwich with smoked pork belly, bologna and chicken liver pate. A decadent, ultra-crispy and deep-fried soft-shell crab patty in San Francisco will change the way you look at burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa

programme.desc: While Anya steps up to embrace being the Spider-Girl, Spider-Man enters Mysterio's funhouse and learns that there's a bounty on his head.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part Three
programme.desc: Spider-Man faces off against his most bizarre bad guy yet, Jack O' Lantern. Then he turns Prowler, a reluctant villain, to the side of heroes when he helps him save his brother.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Bring on the Bad Guys: Part Four
programme.desc: Spidey tracks the identity of the mysterious boss that put a price on his head and who has been sending villains after him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Oddbods: Oddbeard's Curse
programme.desc: Characters with different personalities get together for adventures.

programme.title: Oddbods: Party Monsters
programme.desc: Characters with different personalities get together for adventures.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sleepy River Wild/ Power Play
programme.desc: Gunther falls asleep on a waterpark ride/ Kick tries to get out of playing Romeo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Poll Position/ Jock Wilder's Nature Camp
programme.desc: Kendall runs for class president in order to make Kick's life miserable. So, he decides to get Wacky and Jackie elected instead, but their agenda might even be worse. Kick decides to make Jock Wilder's Nature camp more awesome.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kick or Treat/ Dead Man's Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Kick vows to trick-or-treat at every house in Mellowbrook, including Mary Van Der Death's creepy mansion. Then, Kick and Gunther find and abandoned amusement park deep in the woods and discover that it may be haunted by Dead Man Dave.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flying High! Harmony Pegasus!
programme.desc: Tango decides to take the Victories on a training journey to battle more powerful Bladers. While Dante meets with the mysterious Pheng Hope, Delta challenges the artistic Blindt DeVoy.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Hall-O-Scream!
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: World of X Games: Best of BMX at X Games Shanghai 2019
programme.desc: Looking back at the top moments from BMX Street and Big Air at the inaugural X Games Shanghai 2019 event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit

programme.title: The Closer: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: An overweight owner of a jewelry store turns up dead in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: The Closer: Power of Attorney
programme.desc: What seems like a slam dunk case of rape and murder is fraught with peril. An aggressive DA and Brenda square off and the results will be a first for the squad.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: 65 Hours

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Stiffed
programme.desc: A mortician's body is discovered in one of his own funeral home's caskets, leading the team into the world of embalming, interment and ultimately serial murder. Tommy visits with his son TJ and considers returning to Boston for good.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Yesterday, Today, Tomorrow
programme.desc: Jane and Maura work to solve two murders, one from the past and one present day, which have deep personal connections for Korsak. Jane gets a surprise visit that might lead to romance, and Maura gets upsetting feedback on her novel.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Ocean Frank
programme.desc: The facts don't add up when a dead man is found handcuffed to a bed in his own home. As the bon voyage party approaches, everyone makes a video to say goodbye. Everyone says farewell and plans for their next adventure.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Only the Fastest Survive

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. Virginia
programme.desc: The Fastest in America season kicks off with a Wildcard matchup as Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove they can hold their own against Team Virginia. Later, racers stick around to organize a night of high-stakes grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: It's single-elimination night on the streets including a 16-car street racing tournament in Texas worth $4,000. Local racers in Pennsylvania show off their skills on a city street while Arizona racers put out a fire and get a visit from Mother Nature.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. Virginia
programme.desc: The Fastest in America season kicks off with a Wildcard matchup as Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove they can hold their own against Team Virginia. Later, racers stick around to organize a night of high-stakes grudge racing.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Go Down Fighting
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman hits rock bottom when, after seven seasons, a key crew member quits. Tony Beets transforms some rusty relics into a monster power barge, and a troubled Parker Schnabel misses his own birthday party.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Game Over
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, members of Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a mega-trailer to move his barge, but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Abandonment
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman's crew has quit, and he desperately tries to keep mining with a skeleton team. Parker Schnabel carelessly breaks his truck's air hoses while transporting his washplant, and Tony Beets discovers his dredge is blowing gold out of the sluices.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lifeline
programme.desc: The remnants of the Hoffman crew are at their lowest, but someone brings Todd good news. Tony Beets fires his barge captain, then runs aground up the mighty Yukon River. Rick Ness finally gets Parker Schnabel's second operation up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker vs. Rick
programme.desc: Rick outperforms Parker on his new Indian River claim. Tony's dredge suffers a catastrophic failure, threatening his season. Todd Hoffman's skeleton crew finally sees good gold at their new mine in Colorado.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Excavator Down
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman eats humble pie when he begs his old crew to return. Parker Schnabel loses an excavator in a swamp and Tony Beets gives his daughter Monica her own operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Double Trouble
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew opens a second mine in Colorado and Parker Schnabel tries out a new mechanic who fails to get approval from Mitch. Tony Beets sets sail in a power-barge up the mighty Yukon River.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Cruelest Cut
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel is forced to call his dad in to help his struggling operation, Todd Hoffman has the best clean-up of the season and Tony Beets' daughter Monica starts bringing home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miners vs. Beavers
programme.desc: Todd's whole operation is brought to a halt when a beaver dams his water supply, Parker's plant move turns into an excavator nightmare, and a massive fix means Tony can finally get his broken dredge up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dredge vs. Washplant
programme.desc: Todd finds monster nuggets on the top of a mountain, Parker and Rick struggle with a conveyor, and Tony pits Monica against Kevin to see if the dredge is more efficient than a modern washplant.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Viking Voyage
programme.desc: Todd uses dynamite to blast monster boulders and get to the gold, Parker has to overcome a flood to get to a record gold count, and Tony heads up the freezing Yukon River in his massive power barge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Final Fury
programme.desc: As each crew attempts to hit their final goals, a fist fight on the Hoffman claim ends in a resignation. Tony's plan to relocate his dredge hits a brick wall and Parker records the biggest gold weigh of his life and teases his next big adventure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Review and Renew
programme.desc: Todd appoints himself director when he and the kids film a commercial for the Juice Bar. Meanwhile, Julie and Lea look into a new rejuvenation procedure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Go Flip Yourself
programme.desc: Todd is forced to the rescue when Chase and Parker take on a house-flipping project. Then, when Todd's childhood friend and prankster-in-crime Bill comes to visit, Julie seeks solace with Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Message in a Bottle Rocket
programme.desc: Todd takes the family to a rustic resort for Independence Day, but gets mocked for his outdoor skills. Meanwhile, Chase and Parker become the source of major fireworks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Around
programme.desc: The family visits Las Vegas to support Savannah in the Miss Teen USA Beauty Pageant. While there, Chase has to keep tabs on Nanny Faye's gambling addiction.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pretty in Print
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah are both chosen to be part of a magazine's '25 Most Beautiful People of Nashville' issue. Meanwhile, Julie helps Chase prep for his real estate exam.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair
programme.desc: Todd moves his mother to Nashville, but her belongings take over his pristine home. Meanwhile, Chase insists that his dad take a lie detector test after he catches wind of his father's penchant for lying.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rent Controlled
programme.desc: Todd offers to help Savannah purchase a home, but there are strings attached. Meanwhile, Grayson's monthly phone bill gets him in hot water with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The House That Todd Built
programme.desc: Todd signs the family up with a local charity in order to teach the kids about giving back to the community. Grayson's school project causes a rift between Todd and Faye over their heritage.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: A Few Good Men

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Quarantine Crazy

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Man Problems

programme.title: Las Vegas: Everything Old Is You Again
programme.desc: When Danny visits an antique fair at the Montecito he becomes the focus of a flash back to the Jubilee Hotel and Casino circa 1962 where he is the director of entertainment.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bold, Beautiful and Blue
programme.desc: Danny, Monica and FBI Agent Portis review the security measures taken to protect the Kashmir Sapphire, a priceless gemstone on loan and display at the Montecito, from theft. Meanwhile, Monica tries to lure Ed back to the Montecito with lavish gifts.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Mothwoman
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a comic book convention and Monica questions Danny's decision to have it at the hotel, after she's mistaken for Mothwoman by the comic book fans. Meanwhile, Sam runs into an old nemesis at a funeral and sparks fly.

programme.title: Las Vegas: For Sail by Owner
programme.desc: A hostile takeover of the Montecito casino is thwarted by a stunning change of events. Mike is mugged by a thug, leaving Danny to seek revenge. Meanwhile, Delinda is smitten by a blind man who keeps his real life a secret from her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Down and Dirty
programme.desc: When a televised national poker tour comes to the Montecito, Danny and Mike investigate their hunch that someone is cheating. Elsewhere, Sam battles with Casey over their divorce settlement, and demands half ownership of the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: When diamonds are stolen from the Montecito pool taping of a Fat Joe music video, Danny and Ed rely on amateur sex video footage to track down the thief. Elsewhere, Sam and Mary set out to reveal Mike's secret as a male stripper named Hot Chocolate.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Bitch Is Back
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the opening of Wolfgang Puck's seventh Vegas restaurant. Elsewhere, hotel guests become frightened when they begin to have ghostly encounters. Sam wagers a bet with her nemesis to see who is the best host in Vegas.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.desc: The remaining teams try to best captures the terror and fun of the ultimate horror movie 'jump scare' moment and impresses the judges.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo. Caring for over 1,200 animals, overseeing a world-class wildlife hospital, and conducting global conservation expeditions, their lives are full of adventure.

programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo. Caring for over 1,200 animals, overseeing a world-class wildlife hospital, and conducting global conservation expeditions, their lives are full of adventure.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: Ice Lake Rebels: Ice Lake Ingenuity
programme.desc: The lack of fish and a new neighbour threaten Pike Mike's food supply and peace of mind. Stephan helps Molly install a wind turbine during an ice storm and Ragnar uses the harsh weather to locate and unearth arctic diamonds from a secret location.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: The Rise of Ruff Ryders
programme.desc: The Deans build Ruff Ryders at Powerhouse Studios in Yonkers. DMX signs with Def Jam and makes history releasing two multi-platinum albums in one year. DMX and Ruff Ryders revolutionize hip-hop with the sound of the street.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Money, Power, Respect

programme.title: Love It or List It: Design Intervention
programme.desc: After a couple hurriedly bought their first home together, their family grew to include a three-year-old daughter and two younger twin boys.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Hilary and David Tell All: A House Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: A mother of three boys wants to sell the house they've called home for eight years. She doesn't have her own bedroom and she's had enough. Her oldest hopes to change her mind as he loves the large property and his mom's short drive to work.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Site Unseen
programme.desc: Cole and Ashley took an aggressive gamble and purchased their first home sight unseen in an up-and-coming neighbourhood, but the house turned out to be a disaster.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple With an Ideal Property Are Divided by the Functional Problems in Their Home
programme.desc: Amanda and Grif purchased their home before starting their family. At the time the house felt massive - but now that their daughters are teenagers and Amanda's career has taken off, the house no longer works.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Food and Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds Nora and Diego live with Diego's parents and grandmother in their single-level home in Richmond. The house has plenty of room, but the big foodies family feels cramped during weekday meals and large family gatherings.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Hammer, Hammer, Pedal, Pedal
programme.desc: A family's entire life revolves around cycling, but their house is cramped and doesn't support their active lifestyle. Drew and Jonathan take on the challenge of transforming the house into a forever home that works both on and off a bicycle.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Las Vegas Classic
programme.desc: A couple moves from the Las Vegas suburbs closer to the city into an older home they love with character. Johnathon and Drew help update their kitchen, office, mudroom and master bedroom to create the perfect home for the couple and their two sons.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: A single mom that beat cancer wants to transform her closed-off, dated home into an open space where she and her family can heal. Drew and Jonathan reconfigure her main floor to allow better flow and design a kitchen that works for her entire family.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Out of the Past and Into the Future
programme.desc: A couple fell so in love with a home that they put all the money they had into buying it. As their family grew, the dated layout prevents everyone from being in the same space. After 20 years of making do, they want to make a change for the future.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Family Home Refresh
programme.desc: A couple that bought their home when they were newlyweds are frustrated by the dated kitchen, total lack of storage and closed-off main floor. Jonathan and Drew overhaul the spaces to create a fresh, modern home that will work for years to come.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Move-in Ready
programme.desc: After trying for years, Jackie and JR have two beautiful girls and are now searching for a home to raise them in. They have settled on a spacious suburban house with an amazing backyard but it will need a complete overhaul to make it work.

programme.title: HGTV Urban Oasis
programme.desc: Designer Brian Patrick Flynn gives a behind-the-scenes look as he transforms a 1900 Victorian in Portland, Maine, for HGTV Urban Oasis 2020. He and his team restore traditional features and add New England charm that one lucky winner will love.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness and When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof and Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating a 1950 ranch-style home updating the exterior with faux stone, using a second-story addition to create three new bedrooms and gutting the master suite.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Pump Up the Basement
programme.desc: Tamara updates a massive, but dark, kitchen in a 1978 Tudor home. She moves and enlarges the pantry and adds a banquette while brightening up the space.

programme.title: Movie: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: A woman is released from jail and a friend helps her get back on her feet. Unknown to her, the friend, is using her as a pawn in her own sick game of revenge.

programme.title: Movie: A Daughter's Plan to Kill
programme.desc: A couple invite their estranged daughter to move in, but unbeknownst to them, she has an ulterior motive, that may prove deadly.

programme.title: Movie: Into the Arms of Danger
programme.desc: Jenny, a seventeen-year-old girl, calls for help after getting in a car accident, but her rescuers take her to the home they share with their mother whose grieving the loss of her teen daughter whom she intends to replace with Jenny.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Daughter Switch
programme.desc: A woman learns her daughter isn't actually her biological daughter, throwing their family into crisis as they realize she was switched at birth.

programme.desc: A woman must piece together the details of the accident as they slowly return to her. When she finally remembers that she has a daughter who's missing, she must lead the police to the girl's kidnappers.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnapped: The Hannah Anderson Story
programme.desc: One afternoon, a teen was abducted in a suburb. Later the same day her mother and brother were found dead in the home of a family friend. A multi-state manhunt for Hannah and James DiMaggio lasted a week and ended in a shootout with FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Who Stole My Daughter?
programme.desc: After being presumed dead for five years, a woman's daughter shows up on her doorstep with severe trauma, unable to account for her absence.

programme.title: Movie: Fatal Flip

programme.title: My Paranormal Nightmare: Scarred

programme.title: The Dead Files: Damaged - Winchester, Kentucky

programme.title: The Dead Files: Killing Fields: Springfield, Ohio

programme.title: The Dead Files: 'Til Death - Wymore, Nebraska
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Nebraska to help a woman who believes paranormal activity has taken control of her husband. During her walk, Amy encounters a mischievous trickster whose pranks are becoming more and more vicious.

programme.title: The Dead Files: The Bethlehem Haunting - Bethlehem, Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate violent paranormal activity terrorizing a vulnerable mother and her young child.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Absorbed

programme.title: The Dead Files: Deadly Vessel

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Beautiful Thing About Subpar
programme.desc: As the guests finally prepare to leave the yacht after their extended stay, Hannah hopes her charm wins them over with a generous tip. Meanwhile, Captain Mark is left with a big decision that will shake up the dynamic of the entire crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: That Was Very Greek of Us
programme.desc: A celebratory night out turns ugly and a hungover Bobby must make his apology rounds. For the final charter, an all-male group brings their own set of demands and an exhausted crew must struggle to keep up. Plus, the girls band together to confront Bryan.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Bali Is in Your Court
programme.desc: Jess confronts Aesha over the guests' group photo, while the rest of the boat races to mitigate the impending damage. Tom works to keep a lid on his frustrations, as Malia waits for the other shoe to drop. Aesha makes a decision about her future.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Never Before Scene: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: As the last charter comes to an end, Captain Sandy reckons with a chaotic season while the few remaining chips continue to fall. Rob and Jess struggle to reconcile after a disastrous fight, while Aesha comes to grips with the end of her yachting career.

programme.desc: Cameras follow crewmembers living and working aboard a yacht in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's the Boss?
programme.desc: Another charter season in the Mediterranean gets under way as the crew of the luxury yacht Sirocco sets sail in the waters off the spectacular coast of Croatia. Returning crew Hannah and Bobby are joined by seven new shipmates this time around.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Three's Company
programme.desc: Hannah continues to struggle with working under the close eye of Captain Sandy. After a mishap with the anchor, Sandy realizes her new deck crew has a lot to learn if they are going to have a successful charter season. Bobby develops a crush on Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Chefs, Lies and FaceTime
programme.desc: The rift between Bobby and Hannah grows even wider when Lauren is dragged into a heated debate about the past. A frustrated Bobby calls out Lauren for having an affair with one of his close friends, leaving an emotional Lauren to feel ostracized.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Chained Up and No Place to Go
programme.desc: The naked guests distract the crew as they try to stay focused on their jobs. As Hannah and Bobby hash out their differences, Lauren struggles as the tension mounts between her and Bobby. Meanwhile, Bugsby deals with the loss of her grandmother.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Capt. Sandy gets frustrated when the deck crew makes a dangerous mistake. Also, tension mounts between Adam and Hannah, Bobby springs into action when a guest suffers an accident and a wild night out sparks romance, resulting in a love triangle.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions
programme.desc: Malia, Wes and Adam find themselves in uncharted emotional territory as news of their love triangle spreads below deck. The Oklahomans return as charter guests keeping the interior on their toes as they struggle to keep up with their demanding requests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Malia and Adam share a romantic moment, but complications arise when she continues to flirt with Wes. The charter guests play dirty as they challenge the Sirocco crew to a relay race. Hannah and Adam butt heads again.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Flirting With Danger
programme.desc: When a hot bachelor charters the Sirocco, a smitten Hannah attempts to keep it professional. Wes struggles with his growing feelings for Malia as fireworks ignite between her and Adam. Bugsy and Hannah's relationship gets further strained.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: iCloudy With a Chance of Secrets
programme.desc: Wes declares his feelings for Malia, while her relationship with Adam takes a shocking turn. Max's girlfriend visits. And when Bugsy makes a startling discovery that Hannah has broken yachtie code, Hannah faces Captain Sandy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Kissing Up
programme.desc: When Hannah and Adam continue to clash about the quality of his service, a frustrated Captain Sandy insists that Adam step up his game. Despite trying to keep their relationship professional, Wes and Malia share an intimate moment while on the job.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Dubrovnik Wedgie
programme.desc: When bad weather keeps Sirocco at port, the crew scrambles to keep a VIP charter broker and her friends happy. Wes announces his choice for lead deckhand, causing tension to erupt.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bungle in the Jungle

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Story So-fa

programme.title: Jessie: The Ghostess With the Mostest

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Look Who's Rocking

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Thirteen Candles
programme.desc: Sydney is turning 13 and sets out to plan a sophisticated birthday party. Her plans remind Max of when he tried to organize his own surprise party for his thirteenth birthday back in the 90s.

programme.title: Jessie: Four Broke Kids
programme.desc: The Ross family faces an unexpected dilemma when they find out their parents have lost all their money and must learn to live without it.

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution

programme.desc: A female probation officer's slaying leads detectives to a crooked clan of Irish gypsies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moaning Lisa

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Tell-Tale Head

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: How to Raise the Perfect Dog
programme.desc: Cesar shows how to avoid problems with dogs from the very start and adopted four adorable puppies and filming them living with him for their first eight months.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Down Under

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Hairy Houdini
